hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.md) bunx oxfmt --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) out=$(bunx oxlint "$f" 2>&1); if [ -n "$out" ]; then jq -n --arg msg "$out" '{systemMessage: ("oxlint: " + $msg)}'; fi ;; esac; } || true
out=$(bun run test 2>&1); if echo "$out" | grep -qE ' [1-9][0-9]* fail'; then jq -n --arg msg "$out" '{systemMessage: ("bun test failures:\n" + $msg)}'; fi

out=$(bunx changeset status 2>&1); if echo "$out" | grep -q 'no changesets were found'; then jq -n --arg msg "$out" '{systemMessage: ("changeset reminder: src/ changed but no pending changeset - run `bunx changeset` (or `bunx changeset add --empty` for non-release changes).\n\n" + $msg)}'; fi
